plugins.name: secretaria-onboarding
plugins.description: Conduz o onboarding da Secretária V4 num VPS, do zero ao agente de atendimento: deploy por tier (Coolify/Portainer/compose), Chatwoot + Langfuse com TLS, branding, import do agente via MCP e validação E2E.

descriptions.en: Drives the Secretária V4 onboarding on a VPS, from zero to a working support agent: tiered deploy (Coolify/Portainer/compose), Chatwoot + Langfuse with TLS, branding, MCP agent import, and end-to-end validation.
descriptions.pt-BR: Conduz o onboarding da Secretária V4 num VPS, do zero ao agente de atendimento: deploy por tier (Coolify/Portainer/compose), Chatwoot + Langfuse com TLS, branding, import do agente via MCP e validação E2E.

available_skills.name: secretaria-onboarding
available_skills.description: Provisiona VPS + DNS, faz deploy de Chatwoot + Secretária V4 + Langfuse com TLS, roda o /setup, configura branding, importa o agente via MCP, pluga o Agent Bot do Chatwoot e valida ponta a ponta.

descriptions.en: Provisions VPS + DNS, deploys Chatwoot + Secretária V4 + Langfuse with TLS, runs /setup, configures branding, imports the agent via MCP, wires the Chatwoot Agent Bot, and validates end-to-end.
descriptions.pt-BR: Provisiona VPS + DNS, faz deploy de Chatwoot + Secretária V4 + Langfuse com TLS, roda o /setup, configura branding, importa o agente via MCP, pluga o Agent Bot do Chatwoot e valida ponta a ponta.
